pr.title: Bootstrap OpenSpec scaffolding for ACORD-aligned GraphRAG knowledge graph
pr.body:
Stand up the repository's **Requirements & Architecture** phase: persist the inbound v1.1 technical brief, layer in industry-best-practice upgrades, and structure everything under the [OpenSpec](https://github.com/Fission-AI/OpenSpec) convention so the next change can deliver implementation against a stable contract.

### OpenSpec layout
- `openspec/project.md` — project context, stage scope, conventions.
- `openspec/changes/bootstrap-acord-kg/` — first change with `proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`, plus five domain delta specs (`ontology`, `ingestion`, `retrieval`, `governance`, `api`), each `### Requirement` paired with at least one GIVEN/WHEN/THEN `#### Scenario`.

### Architectural upgrades over v1.1 (full table in `docs/architecture-optimizations.md`)
- **Bitemporal edges** (`valid_from` / `valid_to` / `recorded_at`) + `Endorsement` event node — replaces single `is_active` flag, enables `as_of` queries needed at claim time.
- **Hybrid retrieval**: vector + full-text → RRF fusion → **cross-encoder rerank** → parameterised Cypher → **two-pass grounded answerer with citation validation**. LLM-generated Cypher is forbidden in production.
- **Provenance & confidence** mandatory on every extracted node/edge; tiered promotion (`<0.6` blocked, `0.6–0.8` staging, `≥0.8` active).
- **Entity resolution cascade**: blocking key (ICD/ACORD) → cosine ≥ 0.89 → LLM judge → HITL queue for the 0.80–0.89 ambiguous band.
- **PII tokenisation** at ingest; raw values held in a separate vault.
- **Exclusion-precedes-coverage** rule made explicit and testable.
- **Per-stage latency budgets** (resolve / recall / rerank / cypher / llm) instead of a single SLO.
- Cypher fix: `vector.similarity_function` (underscore) — the hyphen form in v1.1 is rejected by Neo4j 5.13+.

### Reference assets (ready for the next change to consume)
- `assets/cypher/01_constraints_indexes.cypher` — uniqueness + range + full-text + vector index DDL.
- `assets/cypher/10_graphrag_lookup.cypher` — parameterised, bitemporal, as-of-aware retrieval template.
- `assets/schemas/extraction.schema.json` — strict JSON Schema for LLM extractor output (with `provenance` block).
- `assets/prompts/extractor_system.md`, `assets/prompts/answerer_system.md` — system prompts for ingestion and grounded answering.

### Docs
- `docs/technical-spec.md` — inbound v1.1 archived verbatim.
- `docs/architecture-optimizations.md` — human-readable rationale for each upgrade.
- `README.md` — navigation hub.

### Deliberately deferred
LLM/embedding/reranker vendor selection, concrete SLA numbers, HITL tooling choice, and the `Coverage` reified node (offered as optional in `design.md` for rider-heavy products). No runtime code, package manifests or CI pipelines introduced in this change.
pr.author: Copilot
